name: Herb Crusted Trout with Garlic Chili Spinach
recipeIngredient: 4 trout boneless, skinless, cut in half, and seasoned with salt and pepper
3/4 cups fresh white bread crumbs or Japanese wheat crumbs (panko)
2 cloves garlic peeled and sliced paper thin
2 bunches baby spinach, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. With a spatula, gently coat the trout fillets evenly with mustard.
2. In a small bowl, combine the bread crumbs and all the herbs together.
3. Dredge the fish in crumb mixture.
4. In a large skillet at medium heat, melt the butter. Stir occasionally for 2 to 3 minutes or until the butter turns light brown.
5. Add the fish to the pan and cook approximately 1 1/2 minutes on each side. Remove to a plate and keep warm.
6. In a clean large skillet at high heat, saute the garlic and chili flakes in the oil. Do not burn the garlic. Quickly add the spinach and toss around to prevent the garlic from burning. Cook only until wilted. Season and remove to a towel to absorb excess water.
